title: nuovva Non-Stick Wok Pan with Glass Lid– Deep Stir Fry Pan with Induction Base – 28cm Frying Pan with Detachable Handle
features: FINEST QUALITY MATERIALS: The NUOVVA non-stick wok pan is made with the finest high quality and durable materials. The resistant stainless steel induction base provides even heat distribution.

ERGONOMIC & PRACTICAL: This wok frying pan features a reliable, sturdy design with bakelite easy grip handle, making it easy to hold the frying pan. This wok also comes with a tempered glass lid, which combined with the ergonomic handle helps you avoid burns or unwanted accidents.
VERSATILE & MULTIPURPOSE: This stir fry pan is ideal for stir frying your favourite ingredients but it can also be used to grill, broil and braise and sear your delicious home-made recipes.
MESS-FREE DESIGN: This deep-frying pan features a ceramic non stick coating, preventing food from getting stuck on the pan, being extremely easy to clean!
A THOUGHTFUL PRESENT: Order this non-stick wok for yourself or as a thoughtful housewarming present for your friends or loved ones, and you can be sure to win their appreciation!
description: Product Description Nuovva's Non-stick Stone-ware wok With detachable handle When it comes to our customer’s satisfaction, there’s no room for compromise. That’s why NUOVVA works only with top quality materials and verified suppliers, which are guaranteed to deliver to our high expectations. If by some reason you’re not entirely pleased with your purchase, our customer care department has got you covered! Why is this product for you? Whether for professional use or home cooking, our premium quality wok pan is a must in every kitchen. The non-stick NUOVVA frying pan will surprise you with its versatility and functionality, Being ideal for searing, sauteing, simmering, braising, roasting and frying all sorts of delicious dishes! Our Aluminum pot is 100% non stick and is super easy to clean and maintain, it also comes with a detachable handle to save space when storing! it is compatible with all types of induction hobs and gas stoves and includes a tempered glass lid Detachable handle Our pan includes a detachable handle so whether you want to put your food away in the refrigerator or just store the pan in your cupboard you can simply clip of the handle thus saving you space! Induction hob compatible Nuovva's Frying pan is compatible with all types of cookers and burners including Induction, Gas and electric making it really convenient and useful. Includes a tempered glass lid We also include a heat proof tempered glass lid to cover your pot whilst cooking your favorite meal! Amazing features of this product: Space saving removable handle Compatible with induction, gas and electric hobs; Ceramic non-stick surface; Includes a tempered Glass Lid; Minimal oil or grease required for a healthier cooking experience.
